query: Our pnpm monorepo is on TypeScript 6.0 and emits declarations through project references. Plan the TS7 migration, including the temporary stableTypeOrdering comparison and tools that import the compiler API.
tsc 7 says baseUrl and moduleResolution node are unsupported in packages/api/tsconfig.json. This runs as Node ESM; fix the config and explain every module decision.
Design a generic pick helper that preserves keys from a readonly tuple, and add positive plus @ts-expect-error type tests so future refactors cannot widen the return type.
Why does the TypeScript compiler resolve @/domain/user but Node 24 cannot find it after emit? package.json has type module and the tsconfig uses paths.
Our published package compiles from source but consumers cannot resolve its declarations under NodeNext. Review exports, types conditions, emitted d.ts paths, and a consumer fixture.
TypeScript 7 CI builds are slower than local and sometimes run out of memory. Measure extended diagnostics and decide whether checkers, builders, or singleThreaded fits the runner.
Migrate this checkJs codebase from constructor functions and Closure-style JSDoc to syntax accepted by the TypeScript 7 Go compiler.
We want typescript-eslint typed linting and the TS7 CLI in the same workspace. Work out the supported compiler/API arrangement without silently changing which tsc CI runs.
Create a strict tsconfig for a Vite TSX app where Vite owns emit, and explain noUncheckedIndexedAccess and exactOptionalPropertyTypes as contract choices.
This API accepts unknown webhook JSON. Model a discriminated union, implement safe narrowing, and make the default branch fail compilation when a new event kind is added.
Our React TypeScript component rerenders too often when users type. Profile the hooks and fix useMemo/useCallback usage; the tsconfig and types are already correct.
Configure Vitest fake timers and module mocks for our TypeScript app. We are not changing public types or compiler options.
Pick the @typescript-eslint stylistic rules for naming, import order, semicolons, and maximum line length in eslint.config.mjs.
Publish our TypeScript package to npm with provenance, changesets, semantic versioning, and a release GitHub Action. Declarations are already verified.
Reduce the Vite production bundle by splitting vendor chunks and tuning Rollup tree shaking. TypeScript typecheck is already fast and clean.
Build an SPFx React web part in TypeScript with Fluent UI controls, SharePoint theme tokens, and tenant-wide deployment.
A JavaScript Node service times out during fetch retries. There are no TS files, JSDoc annotations, or tsconfig in the repository.
Review this pull request for authentication bypasses and SQL injection. It happens to be written in TypeScript, but the request is a security audit.
Upgrade our Angular workspace and rewrite typed reactive forms, template control flow, and component tests. The framework's documented TypeScript version is already installed.
Prettier and ESLint disagree on formatting generated TypeScript files. Decide ignore patterns and formatter ownership; compilation is unaffected.
